skills.name: aoa-change-protocol
skills.summary: Bounded workflow for Codex to plan a change, keep it scoped, verify it explicitly, and report it clearly.
skills.trigger_boundary_short: Use when a requested change needs a clear scope, explicit checks, and a crisp closeout.
skills.inputs_short: A bounded task request plus the current repository context.
skills.outputs_short: A scoped change, verification evidence, and a concise final report.
skills.workflow_short: Scan context, plan the slice, apply the change, verify it, and report what happened.
skills.main_anti_patterns_short: Do not silently widen scope or claim checks that were not run.
skills.verification_short: Make sure touched files and executed or blocked checks are reported honestly.

skills.name: aoa-context-scan
skills.summary: Small context scan skill for bounded repository orientation before a change.
skills.trigger_boundary_short: Use when a task needs just enough repository orientation before acting.
skills.inputs_short: The task request and the current repo tree or files under review.
skills.outputs_short: A compact map of the relevant files, flows, and constraints.
skills.workflow_short: Find the smallest useful slice of context, confirm the key surfaces, and stop before over-reading.
skills.main_anti_patterns_short: Do not turn a bounded scan into an open-ended exploration pass.
skills.verification_short: Confirm the scan surfaced the files and constraints the later change actually uses.
